query: Please prepare a travel itinerary from Charlotte to Charlottesville for 2 people, spanning 3 days from March 20th to March 22nd, 2022, within a budget of $600. Our preferred accommodations are private rooms, and we will be bringing our pets along, so pet-friendly lodgings are a must. Please note that no flights are required for this journey.
